scenarios.name: Bounded episode packaging
assertions: Graphiti receives summaries, pointers, and Layer 3 appropriate beliefs.
Raw logs are not used as the default episode payload.

scenarios.name: Tentative cross-thread memory
assertions: High-signal notions can be shared across threads.
Tentative memory is marked as low-confidence or unreconciled.

scenarios.name: Reconciliation and provenance
assertions: Reconciliation promotes, rejects, or supersedes tentative memory correctly.

non_goals: Using Graphiti as a transcript archive
Allowing unreconciled tentative memory to become the default truth surface
